final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal wide banner with generous negative space for text overlay; city skyline as horizontal spread
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with neon lights gradually brightening, hurrying pedestrians in foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk scene — neon-lit street level, distant high-rise glass facades catching the last sunlight
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic golden-hour-to-neon transition atmosphere with high contrast between warm sunset and cool neon — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of warm sunset amber against cool neon blue-purple urban glow — exact ratios and hues are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-texture documentary feel — exact grain and sharpness rendering is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, bold primary headline, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal aspect ratio; must leave sufficient clear areas for text overlays; all three text elements must be present
Avoid:

error: {"source":"provider","message":"Your resource has been temporarily blocked because we detected behavior that may violate our content policy. For more details on Azure OpenAI service content policy, please visit https://aka.ms/aoaicodeofconduct","error_code":"API_CALL_ERROR","provider_error_code":"Forbidden","http_status_code":403,"stage":"submit"}
